title: Modification
description: A reusable add-on or discount definition configured in the Braintree Control Panel and available to apply to subscriptions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the add-on or discount.

description.description: Description of what this add-on or discount represents.

amount.description: The price adjustment amount as a decimal string.

kind.description: Whether this is an add_on or a discount.

never_expires.description: If true, this modification applies indefinitely with no limit on number of billing cycles.

number_of_billing_cycles.description: Number of billing cycles this modification applies.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this modification was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when this modification was last updated.
